## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.13

### 📷 Cameras
- Keeps the confirmed working native Home Assistant WebRTC camera stream path unchanged.
- Preserves the ICE candidate ordering guard so Home Assistant candidates are not flushed to the camera before the camera SDP answer is received.
- Keeps camera recording/playback metadata on Motion events when X-Sense reports APK playback details.

### 🔔 Blueprint
- Updates the included camera event blueprint so the default mobile notification can open the Motion recording when tapped.
- Uses the Motion event `recording_url` as the notification tap target when X-Sense provides a direct playback URL.
- Falls back to `noAction` when no recording URL is available, avoiding empty or broken notification links.

### 💧 Devices
- Keeps SBS50 child device support for SWS51 water sensors.
- Makes the optional SWS51 child info shadow read failure-contained so it cannot interrupt the normal SBS50 refresh path.
- Caches the supplemental SWS51 child info read after it succeeds or is confirmed missing to avoid repeated extra shadow reads.

### 📚 Documentation
- Updates the main README and English camera notification documentation to explain tap-to-open recording notifications.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the blueprint mobile notification `url` and Android `clickAction` fields.
- Adds regression coverage that the blueprint uses `noAction` when no recording URL is available.
- Confirms the camera stream implementation files remain unchanged for this release.
